_patch_meta.description: Dimension Review C13 Reg 35 (covetousness): 10 groups assigned. 5 dimension changes: 2075-001/002 and 2077-001 Volition→Emotion-Positive; 2078-001 Volition→Emotion-Negative; 778-002 UNCLASSIFIED→Relational Disposition. Registry stamp set.

set.notes: Eagerness as inner dispositional orientation of forward-leaning readiness toward God and good. AV Act 17:11 confirms. Automated label confirmed.
Inner courage/cheerfulness grounded in faith amid crisis. Positive affective state. Changed from Volition to Emotion — Positive.

operations.description: 2075-001 euthumeō — covetousness: Emotion — Positive, HUMAN (changed from Volition)

set.notes: Cheerfulness as inner-being ground of praise. Positive affective state. Changed from Volition to Emotion — Positive.

operations.description: 2075-002 euthumeō — covetousness: Emotion — Positive, HUMAN (changed from Volition)

set.notes: The willing spirit — inner eagerness toward God in tension with fleshly weakness. AV Mat 26:41 confirms. Automated label confirmed.
Eagerness as inner motivation for mission. AV Rom 1:15 confirms. Automated label confirmed.
Cheerful inner composure in adversarial contexts. Positive affective state. Changed from Volition to Emotion — Positive.

operations.description: 2077-001 euthumos — covetousness: Emotion — Positive, HUMAN (changed from Volition)

set.notes: Inner state of discouragement — loss of heart produced by provocation. Negative affective state. Changed from Volition to Emotion — Negative.

operations.description: 2078-001 athumeō — covetousness: Emotion — Negative, HUMAN (changed from Volition)

set.notes: Eager willing service — inner orientation of freedom and genuine care vs compulsion and greed. AV 1Pe 5:2 confirms. Automated label confirmed.
Covetousness as insatiable inner orientation toward possessing more. Stable directional orientation toward an object. AV 2Pe 2:14 confirms. Automated KEYWORD_STRONG confirmed.
Covetousness as idolatry — fundamental reorientation of the worshipping self toward the wrong ultimate object. Changed from UNCLASSIFIED to Relational Disposition.

operations.description: 778-002 pleonexia — covetousness: Relational Disposition, HUMAN (changed from UNCLASSIFIED)
